StratIQ

AI Business Intelligence Reports

Deep-dive competitive analysis and actionable marketing strategy — delivered as a professional report in hours, not weeks. Know exactly where you stand and what to do about it.

Forge

AI-Powered Managed Marketing

Let us handle it. Forge is our done-for-you AI marketing system — content, strategy, posting, and reporting — all automated and managed by our team so you can focus on your business.

From $97/moLearn More →

Why Small Businesses Choose SDM

We’re not your typical agency. We’re a partner — built by someone who’s been in the trenches of small business ownership.

🤝

A Partner, Not a Vendor

Matt picks up the phone. You won't get handed off to an account manager who doesn't know your business. We build real relationships because we genuinely care about your success.

🔓

No Contracts. Ever.

Month-to-month, always. We earn your business every single month. If we're not delivering real value, you shouldn't be locked in — and we're confident enough in our work that we don't need you to be.

🏘️

Small Business at Heart

Our founder ran a landscaping business and spent a decade in the fire service. We know what it means to work with your hands, serve a community, and build something real. That's who we built this for.

🤖

AI That Actually Works

We don't just talk about AI — we've built it. Our tools diagnose your marketing gaps and automate the fixes. Real results, not buzzwords.

What Small Business Owners Say

Real feedback from real clients across our region.

“Social Drive Media didn't just post content — they actually understood our business and helped us show up online the right way. Matt is the real deal.”

Local Business Owner

Hagerstown, MD

“The StratIQ report opened our eyes to what our competitors were doing that we weren't. We pivoted our marketing in two weeks and saw results within the month.”

Restaurant Owner

Chambersburg, PA

“I tried three other agencies before SDM. None of them felt like a partner. Matt does. It's a completely different experience.”

Home Services Business Owner

Greencastle, PA

Built by a Small Business Owner, for Small Business Owners

Matt Baer spent a decade as a firefighter in Northern Virginia, then built and ran a landscaping business from the ground up. He knows what it takes to run a small business — and he built Social Drive Media to give business owners like him the marketing firepower they deserve.

Meet Matt & the Story Behind SDM →
